Name: Label
Description: A display label for the ManagedRepresentationScheme.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the content and purpose of the ManagedRepresentationScheme.

Name: ManagedRepresentationSchemeReference
Description: A reference to another ManagedRepresentationScheme to include in this scheme by reference.

Name: ManagedRepresentationReference
Description: A description of a text based representation to be used by a question response domain or variable value representation.

Name: ManagedRepresentationGroupReference
Description: A grouping of ManagedRepresentations for conceptual, administrative or other reasons.
